candidates.name: BNB/USDT 4h Trend Momentum
candidates.description: Ride a confirmed bullish EMA stack (20>50>100) with positive MACD momentum; hold until the 20/50 stack breaks. ATR risk bracket.
candidates.reasoning: Trend momentum: enter a confirmed bullish EMA stack with a positive MACD histogram and RSI above the midline, and ride it until the 20/50 stack rolls over. No upper RSI cap — momentum is the thesis. Signal context: regime=risk_on, F&G=63, funding=0.0120%. [walk-forward: 10 OOS windows, beat buy&hold in 40%; median OOS -9.38% vs benchmark +0.19%; OOS Sharpe -1.46, OOS maxDD 25.5%, 143 trades, risk_score 26/100.]

candidates.name: BNB/USDT 4h Mean-Reversion (Bollinger/RSI)
candidates.description: Buy the reversion turn — price reclaiming the lower Bollinger band from oversold — and exit back at the band mean.
candidates.reasoning: Mean-reversion: wait for price to reclaim the lower Bollinger band from oversold (the turn, not the knife), then exit as it reverts to the band mean. Signal context: regime=risk_on, F&G=63, funding=0.0120%. [walk-forward: 10 OOS windows, beat buy&hold in 40%; median OOS -12.28% vs benchmark +0.19%; OOS Sharpe -2.23, OOS maxDD 20.1%, 207 trades, risk_score 34/100.]

candidates.name: BNB/USDT 4h Donchian Breakout
candidates.description: Enter on a close above the prior-20-bar high confirmed by a volume surge in a trending tape (ADX); wide ATR target.
candidates.reasoning: Breakout: ride volatility expansion when price clears the prior-20-bar high on above-average volume with ADX confirming a trend. Signal context: regime=risk_on, F&G=63, funding=0.0120%. [walk-forward: 10 OOS windows, beat buy&hold in 50%; median OOS -6.64% vs benchmark +0.19%; OOS Sharpe -1.62, OOS maxDD 15.9%, 105 trades, risk_score 36/100.]
